categories_to_watch.category: Travel & Cruise Accessories (Power Strips, Trackers, Organizers)
categories_to_watch.reason: Multiple Amazon Movers & Shakers entries in cruise-approved power strips and item trackers simultaneously in May — summer travel season is generating the strongest multi-SKU surge seen this quarter.
Outdoor TV covers, garden hoses, weed killers, and seed packets all appearing on Movers & Shakers in the same week signals a broad outdoor season activation that will sustain through September.
Moving bags, mattress protectors, and power strips all showing dual Movers & Shakers and Bestsellers placements — the May through August dorm prep cycle is beginning its ramp now.

categories_to_watch.category: Pet Accessories (Door Mats, Outdoor Pet Products)
categories_to_watch.reason: Spring outdoor activity for pets is driving functional pet home accessories; the category has low brand saturation and strong impulse purchase behavior.
Five distinct wireless audio SKUs appear across Movers & Shakers and Bestsellers this week, signaling sustained category growth driven by summer gym season, travel, and graduation gifting.
AirTag 4-pack and slim wallet tracker cards both rising fast in May — lost luggage anxiety from summer travel demand is a proven seasonal catalyst with strong social proof content.
Zinnia seeds on both Movers & Shakers AND Bestsellers, plus liquid plant food rising — the spring garden window is a narrow but intense purchasing period with extremely high conversion intent.

avoid.product_type: Universal TV Remote Controls (Samsung, LG, Hisense, Vizio, Fire Stick replacements)
avoid.reason: 6 of the top 6 Movers & Shakers in Electronics are TV remotes — this category is saturated with dozens of near-identical listings at $7–$14, margins are destroyed by competition, and sub-$15 price points leave no room for dropship profit after platform fees and shipping.

avoid.product_type: Apple-Branded Products (AirPods, AirPods Pro, Apple Watch, iPad, Apple EarPods)
avoid.reason: All Apple products in the bestsellers list are heavily brand-controlled, cannot be legitimately dropshipped at margin, and any unauthorized resale risks listing removal. Avoid entirely.

avoid.product_type: Amazon-Branded Products (Echo Dot, Fire TV Stick, Kindle, Amazon Basics)
avoid.reason: Amazon actively suppresses third-party listings competing with its own branded products and prices them to win the Buy Box — you cannot compete on price or placement against the manufacturer-retailer.

avoid.product_type: Zinnia and Flower Seeds (ultra low ticket under $5 source price)
avoid.reason: Despite trending, seed packets source at $4.99 and compete against established gardening brands — the price floor after Amazon fees, packaging, and shipping leaves essentially zero margin for a dropshipper.

avoid.product_type: Wired Replacement Remote Controls and Low-Ticket Accessories Under $10
avoid.reason: Any product sourcing under $5 and retailing at $7–$10 cannot support viable dropship economics after marketplace fees (15%), payment processing, customer service, and return costs — avoid all sub-$15 retail electronics accessories.

analysis.market_insights:
The first week of May 2026 is showing a powerful seasonal convergence that creates one of the best short-windows of the year for dropshippers: travel season, spring outdoor living, college prep, and Mother's Day gifting are all activating simultaneously. The most actionable signal is the multi-SKU surge in travel-oriented electronics — flat plug power strips, compact travel strips, and item trackers are all climbing together, which means category demand is real and not driven by a single viral SKU. Dropshippers who can source lightweight, non-branded versions of these products and launch within 5–7 days will catch the rising wave before peak saturation arrives in late May and June.

The outdoor living category deserves special attention: two competing outdoor TV cover SKUs and multiple garden product SKUs appearing on Movers & Shakers in the same week is a strong multi-competitor signal that the category is pulling demand broadly, not just for one brand. For dropshippers, this means white-label sourcing in outdoor entertainment accessories, garden tools, and pet outdoor products will find willing buyers with limited brand loyalty. The college dorm prep cycle is also beginning its 14-week ramp — products like mattress protectors, moving bags, and power strips have an unusually long tail of demand from May through mid-August that rewards early inventory positioning now.
analysis.data_quality_note: TikTok and Google Trends data were absent from the raw dataset provided — all recommendations are derived exclusively from Amazon Movers & Shakers and Bestsellers signals, which reduces cross-platform confidence scoring; TikTok validation should be manually confirmed for audio, pet, and garden categories before committing to large inventory orders.
